name: input-group-text
visual_summary: input-group-text is a utility component used within input groups to provide a text or icon within the group, often used for labels or additional info in forms and data entry interfaces
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-group-text
Description: input-group-text is a utility component used within input groups to provide a text or icon within the group, often used for labels or additional info in forms and data entry interfaces
Style: e.g. minimal, modern
Interactions: e.g. static
Tags: input, form, group, helper

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
